description_long: This is a retail package of Faragello Frozen Green Beans, presented in a sealed, flexible plastic bag. The front of the package features a prominent red and white Faragello logo above a clear product name and an image of green beans, with text in both English and Arabic. The back of the package displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and multilingual product information, along with recycling and certification symbols. The sides of the bag are narrow and show partial graphics and text, indicating the bag's thin profile when viewed from the side. The overall appearance is clean and commercial, with a focus on freshness and product visibility. The packaging is typical for frozen food items found in urban grocery stores or supermarkets.
description: A sealed plastic bag of Faragello Frozen Green Beans with a red logo, product image, and nutritional information on the back. The packaging is colorful and designed for retail display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Faragello logo, product name in English and Arabic, and a vivid image of green beans.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals a thin profile with partial graphics and some multilingual text visible along the edge.
description_view_2: The back view displays detailed nutritional facts, ingredients, and recycling symbols, with less emphasis on branding.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing a slim edge with partial graphics and text.
attribute_brand_logo: A red and white Faragello logo is visible on the front and back, featuring a stylized 'F' and the brand name in bold letters.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the package clearly states 'Frozen Green Beans' with an image of green beans, indicating the flavor and contents.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A nutrition facts panel is visible on the back, listing calories and other nutritional information.
